name: Capital One Quicksilver Cash Rewards Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn a $200 cash bonus once you spend $500 on purchases within the first three months of opening an account

earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 1.5% cash back on every purchase, every day

earning_rates.category: Hotels, rental cars, vacation rentals, activities via Capital One Travel

other_benefits: Hertz Five Star status - skip rental counter at select locations and enjoy wider vehicle selection
24-hour travel assistance with emergency card replacement and cash advance

insurance.purchase_protection: Up to $1,000 per loss, $25,000 per year for damage/theft within 90 days
insurance.extended_warranty: Extends manufacturer warranty on eligible items

sources.notes: Capital One official benefits page with full details on earning rates, travel benefits, and protections
Capital One official card page with $200 welcome bonus and 1.5% cash back offer
WalletHub card overview confirming $200 bonus and no annual fee

notes: Simple flat-rate cash back card with no annual fee and no foreign transaction fees. The 5% on Capital One Travel and Entertainment makes it more valuable for travelers who use those portals. No minimum to redeem, rewards don't expire. Extended warranty and purchase protection included. Best for those who want simple, consistent earning with no annual fee.
